debug_info.goal:
hyp : ∃ x, ∃ (_ : 4 < x), ∃ x_1, ∃ (_ : allExpert (after x x_1)), x_1.length < 2 * x - 4
m : ℕ
m_is_minimal : ∀ n < m, ¬∃ (_ : 4 < n), ∃ x, ∃ (_ : allExpert (after n x)), x.length < 2 * n - 4
le_m : 4 < m
S : List (Call m)
S_allExp : allExpert (after m S)
S_len_lt : S.length ≤ 2 * m - 5
is_minimal_m : is_minimal m
noHo_S : noHo m S
initPart : List (Call m) := List.filter (fun c => isInitialCall m S c) S
midPart : List (Call m) := List.filter (fun c => decide (¬isInitialCall m S c = true ∧ ¬isFinalCall m S c = true)) S
finalPart : List (Call m) := List.filter (fun c => isFinalCall m S c) S
⊢ S.length = initPart.length + midPart.length + finalPart.length

failed_attempts:
have disjoint : ∀ c ∈ S, ¬(isInitialCall S c ∧ isFinalCall S c) := by
      intro c hc ⟨hI, hF⟩
      rw [initial_both_or_neither S c hc] at hI
      rw [final_both_or_neither S c hc] at hF
      let k := c.fst
      have vk_eq_1 : v S k = 1 := by
        -- noHo implies that no pair of agents communicates more than once.
        -- Since c is both the first and last call for k, k participates in exactly one call.
        sorry
      have ineq := noHo_exp_and_known_needs_many_calls S noHo_S k (S_allExp k).1 (S_allExp k).2
      rw [vk_eq_1] at ineq
      omega

    rw [List.length_eq_countP_add_countP (fun c => isInitialCall S c)]
    rw [List.length_eq_countP_add_countP (fun c => isFinalCall S c) (S.filter (fun c => ¬isInitialCall S c))]
    congr 1
    · rfl
    · rw [add_comm]
      congr 1
      · rw [List.countP_filter]
        apply List.countP_congr
        intro c _
        simp only [decide_eq_true_eq, Bool.decide_and, Bool.decide_eq_true]
        rw [and_comm]
        rfl
      · rw [List.countP_filter]
        apply List.countP_congr
        intro c hc
        simp only [decide_eq_true_eq]
        by_cases h : isFinalCall S c
        · simp [h, disjoint c hc ⟨·, h⟩]
        · simp [h]
